focus: Verify F5 dead variable fix in useNotificationStore.markAllRead
notes: F5 fix verified clean: `unreadIds` variable removed, replaced with `unread` array of full notification rows, per-row syncableWrite loop emits one put per unread notification. No dead variables, no unused declarations. Type-safe with `Notification` spread and `readAt: now` override.
F6 (KI-E96-S02-L01) is documented known issue — not re-flagged per reviewer instruction.
All other diff sections (addNotification, markRead, dismiss, hydrateFromRemote) consistent with the syncableWrite pattern from E93.
